calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-29-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, July 29, 2015 in Department 525:
David Chicca and Ninette Chicca, Respondents/Plaintiffs appear as Propria Persona.
Tristan A. J. Spector, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona. No appearance by Rebecca A. Olbright.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn. Plaintiff/Respondent, David Chicca and Ninette Chicca testify on their own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: not marked - pictures and rental agreement.

Defendant/Appellant, Tristan A.J. Spector testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: not marked - pictures, threat letter and painted wall from neighbor's tenant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence returned to the parties by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Robert Stumpf; Clerk J. Kong; Matters Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-19-2015 Judgment Entered
